news.headline: noco-noco acquires X-SEPA™ equipment in restart effort as part of plan, move marks major advancement in production.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Singapore, noco-noco took a significant step forward in its "restart plan" by finalizing a contract to purchase manufacturing machinery incorporating the groundbreaking X-SEPA™ technology developed by 3DOM Alliance and noco-tech. This move aligns with the strategy outlined on September 19 and marks a key development for the company.

news.headline: ACNB Corporation raises quarterly cash dividend to $0.32 per share, up 6.7% from last year; $2.7 million total payout.
news.summary: ACNB Corporation, the financial holding company for ACNB Bank and ACNB Insurance Services, Inc., revealed that its Board of Directors has sanctioned a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.32 per share of ACNB Corporation common stock. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on December 13, 2024, to shareholders recorded as of November 29, 2024. This amount marks a 6.7% increase from the previous quarter's $0.30 per share. The dividend decision means that around $2.7 million will be distributed to ACNB Corporation shareholders during the fourth quarter of 2024.

news.headline: FibroBiologics receives a patent from EPO for fibroblast delivery of anti-cancer agents; 160+ patents issued, Patent Number 19795975.2.
news.summary: FibroBiologics, Inc. (Nasdaq: FBLG), a biotechnology company based in Houston, disclosed the acquisition of a patent (Patent Number 19795975.2) from the European Patent Office. This patent, among their 160+ patents, pertains to methods and compositions for treating cancer with modified fibroblasts, designed to improve the delivery of anti-cancer agents. Specializing in developing therapeutics and potential cures for chronic diseases, FibroBiologics is at the forefront of innovation in the clinical-stage, aiming to revolutionize cancer treatment with advanced techniques.

news.headline: Nano Dimension announces 2024 AGM for shareholders to back company strategy that drove M&A, financial, operational boosts.
news.summary: Shareholders have the opportunity to back the company's ongoing strategy that brought about significant M&A, financial, and operational advancements, as well as improvements in governance. This support would ensure the continuation of a successful business direction that has yielded transformational results.

news.headline: HUMBL receives U.S. Patent for currency transfer using blockchain, patent No. 12,118,613 issued on Oct. 15, 2024.
news.summary: In San Diego, California on October 16, 2024, HUMBL, Inc. (OTC: HMBL) announced the reception of U.S. Patent No. 12,118,613 from the United States Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO) for their "System and Method for Transferring Currency Using Blockchain." This patent was officially granted on October 15, 2024.

news.headline: Diana Shipping Inc. signs time charter contract with Raffles Shipping for m/v Selina at $10,500/day until Mar 1, 2025.
news.summary: In Athens, Greece on October 16, 2024, Diana Shipping Inc. (NYSE: DSX) disclosed a new time charter agreement for one of its Panamax dry bulk vessels, the m/v Selina. Operating through a wholly-owned subsidiary, the global shipping company sealed the deal with Raffles Shipping International Pte. Ltd. The contract sets a gross charter rate of US$10,500 per day, with a 5.00% commission to third parties. The charter is effective from tomorrow until at least March 1, 2025, potentially extending until April 20, 2025.

news.headline: Ferrari to release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 5, 2024 - NYSE/EXM: RACE. Stay tuned.
news.summary: Ferrari N.V. revealed that they are set to report their financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on Tuesday, November 5, 2024. The announcement came from Maranello, Italy. Ferrari, listed on the NYSE and EXM under the ticker symbol RACE, will make public its earnings and other relevant numbers on the specified date. Stay tuned for detailed insights into the company's financial status during this period.

news.headline: Firefly Neuro partners with Bright Minds Biosciences to analyze Phase 1 data using AI BNA™ tech; subjects wear Zeto EEG headsets.
news.summary: In the initial study phase, participants made use of EEG headsets from Zeto, a partner of Firefly. Following this, the data collected was examined through Firefly's sophisticated AI BNA technology analysis system.

news.headline: Infortar approved to acquire 100% share in Tallinna Raamatutrükikoja Osaühing by Competition Authority.
news.summary: A stock exchange announcement was made on September 16, 2024 by Aktsiaselts Infortar regarding a purchase agreement with ViroInvestment OÜ. The agreement states that Aktsiaselts Infortar will purchase a 100% shareholding in Tallinna Raamatutrükikoja Osaühing.

news.headline: Coop Pank extends Paavo Truu's term as Management Board member until Feb 14, 2028.
news.summary: The Supervisory Board of Coop Pank AS announced on 16 October 2024 that they have approved the extension of Paavo Truu's term as a Member of the Management Board for an additional 3 years. This means Truu will remain in office until 14 February 2028, following the end of his current term.

news.headline: Pimco's CIO for global fixed income: I see a 50% chance of global trade war, raising downside global growth risks.
SKYX partners with Wayfair for advanced smart lighting in retail & professional segments, including designers & architects.
news.summary: SKYX has recently revealed a partnership with Wayfair to introduce their innovative Plug & Play lighting systems to the retail and professional sectors. This collaboration aims to leverage SKYX's advanced and smart lighting solutions in enhancing the ambience and functionality of various establishments. The collaboration targets an extensive market, encompassing both retail and professional areas. Through this collaboration, SKYX intends to provide cutting-edge lighting technology to a broad audience.

news.headline: Pimco CIO: The shock of tariffs could have a significant impact on Europe.
Bid by Nordecon AS wins 40.1 million euro contract for Estonian Public Broadcasting new TV building construction.
news.summary: Today, Riigi Kinnisvara AS announced their decision on the public procurement for the construction of the new Estonian Public Broadcasting TV Building. They have deemed the bid from Nordecon AS successful, with a total value of 40.1 million euros, encompassing the reserve amount and excluding VAT. Once the mandatory 14-day appeal period, as outlined by law, has concluded, Riigi Kinnisvara AS and Nordecon can finalize the contract. Details regarding the signing will be communicated through a separate announcement on the stock exchange.

news.headline: Pimco: We maintain China Yuan underweight position given trade risks and time needed for stimulus to work.
Airline fined $4M for barring 128 Jewish passengers from boarding; highest penalty by Transportation Dept.
news.summary: In 2022, the Transportation Department issued its highest fine to an airline for barring 128 passengers from catching a connecting flight.

news.headline: $10,000 incentive reversed Tulsa's brain drain by attracting remote workers, benefiting both employees and the city.
news.summary: A study revealed that offering incentives for remote employees to relocate to Tulsa, Oklahoma resulted in benefits for all parties involved.

news.headline: Zafin teams up with Microsoft to boost bank modernization through Azure AI, solidifying their partnership worldwide.
news.summary: Zafin, a leading provider of SaaS core modernization solutions for banks, has extended its global strategic partnership with Microsoft, based in Vancouver, British Columbia. This collaboration aims to bolster Zafin's technological offerings and solidify its position in core banking modernization and innovation. The agreement, running on Microsoft Azure, leverages the platform's scalability to provide enhanced benefits to banks worldwide.

news.headline: Ansley Park Capital sees significant growth, appoints key leaders. Flexible financial solutions drive expansion across sectors.
news.summary: White Plains, New York - Ansley Park Capital, a leading lending and specialty finance platform, revealed important leadership appointments and organizational adjustments to support its growth strategy. The company has witnessed remarkable expansion in various sectors due to its dedication to providing adaptable financial services tailored to individual client requirements. By implementing these changes, Ansley Park Capital aims to further enhance its operations and build upon its success.

news.headline: Phenom CEO Mahe Bayireddi recognized by Goldman Sachs for entrepreneurship in HR tech industry.
news.summary: Entrepreneur Mahe Bayireddi, CEO of Phenom, based in Philadelphia, has been recognized by Goldman Sachs for his contributions in the field of HR Tech. The prestigious award was given in honor of his entrepreneurial achievements. This recognition underscores Bayireddi’s leadership in the industry and his company’s success. The specific details of the award and ceremony have not been disclosed.

news.headline: eternalHealth reveals 2025 Medicare Advantage plans emphasizing affordable, high quality healthcare with expanded coverage.
news.summary: A prominent health insurance provider in Massachusetts and Arizona, eternalHealth, revealed its Medicare Advantage plans for 2025. In a time where stability is crucial for Medicare Beneficiaries, the company offers enhanced benefits to address members' key health needs. The plans provide increased choice, improved benefits, and expanded coverage options for the beneficiaries. Notably, one of the key highlights of the new offerings is the introduction of an enhanced and sustainable extra benefit.

news.headline: Ireland preparing new crypto regulations before EU anti-money laundering law kicks in on Dec 30, 2024.
news.summary: The European Union's legislation addressing anti-money laundering and countering the financing of terrorism will be enforced starting December 30, 2024.

news.headline: Nex Playground reveals holiday game lineup with characters from Kung Fu Panda, Barbie, TMNT, Sesame Street, etc. Includes collaborations with Universal Products & Experiences, Mattel, Paramount Game Studios, Spin Master, and more. Joining existing games with Hasbro, Sesame Workshop, and Fruit Ninja. #NexPlayground #HolidayGames
news.summary: In San Francisco, Nex, a renowned motion technology company, has introduced its latest games lineup for release during the holiday season and into next year on its acclaimed Nex Playground active gaming console. The upcoming games, developed in partnership with Universal Products & Experiences, Mattel, Paramount Game Studios, and Spin Master, will complement Nex's current game offerings created in collaboration with Hasbro, Sesame Workshop, Miraculous, and Halfbrick’s Fruit Ninja. The variety of new titles aims to enhance the gaming experience for users, with the company's innovative approach continuing to impress gamers worldwide.

news.headline: ARC awards $2 million to Jewish Healthcare Foundation for nursing home workforce training in PA, $5 million total investment with matching partners.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh, the Appalachian Regional Commission (ARC) revealed a grant of $2 million allocated to the Jewish Healthcare Foundation (JHF) for enhancing the under-resourced nursing home workforce. The goal is to strengthen provider and community-based training programs by collaborating with nursing homes and SEIU-PA in Pennsylvania’s Appalachian counties. This initiative’s total investment amounts to $5 million, with contributions from project partners. Ultimately, this project aims to provide training and upskill opportunities for individuals in the nursing home sector.

news.headline: Renovaro Inc. undergoes strategic restructuring with new CEO and 4 directors appointed. Focus on AI Platform for cancer detection.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on October 16, 2024, Renovaro Inc. disclosed a strategic overhaul and change in leadership within the company, known for its advancements in cancer diagnosis and treatment through artificial intelligence. The restructuring aims to concentrate resources on RenovaroCube, the company's AI Platform for detecting multiple cancers early and monitoring patients. With the backing of a large majority of shareholders, the Board introduced David Weinstein as the new CEO and director, along with appointing Maurice van Tilburg as the Chairman and adding Douglas Calder, James A. McNulty CPA, and Mark A. Collins PhD as new directors to the Board.

news.headline: Amazon introduces new Kindle lineup with color Kindle, fast Paperwhite, reimagined Scribe. Sales hit decade high.
news.summary: Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) unveiled a range of new Kindle devices in Seattle. The lineup includes the first color Kindle, a redesigned Kindle Scribe, the fastest Kindle Paperwhite, and a new entry-level Kindle in a vibrant Matcha color. Sales of Kindle reached a ten-year peak last year, with a majority of purchases made by first-time buyers. Customers' love for Kindle continues to grow, with increased reading on their devices. For more information about the new Kindle family, visit amazon.com/kindlefamily.

news.headline: Prologis reports Q3 earnings: Rental revenue $1.90B misses estimates, FFO $1.43 beats consensus. Co issued $4.6B debt.
news.summary: Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD) saw an increase in its stock value following the release of its third-quarter financial results. Although rental revenue amounted to $1.90 billion, falling short of the expected $1.95 billion, the company maintained an average occupancy rate of 95.9%. Prologis boasted a leased 49.0 million square feet (MSF) operating portfolio alongside a 1.8 MSF development portfolio. Core funds from operations per diluted share were reported at $1.43, surpassing last year's $1.30 and exceeding the anticipated $1.37. Throughout the quarter, Prologis and its co-investment ventures collectively issued $4.6 billion of debt, secured at an average interest rate of 4.6% and an average term of 8.9 years.

news.headline: Juneau, AK residents reject proposal to limit cruise ships on Saturdays despite concerns about overcrowding and its impact on local businesses.
news.summary: A group of residents in the capital of Alaska expressed frustration with the large influx of cruise crowds and proposed restrictions on ship traffic specifically on Saturdays. This proposal, although aiming to alleviate the situation for locals, could potentially have adverse effects on businesses dependent on tourism revenue.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures increase, Nvidia boosts techs as ASML plunges. Indexes fell, ASML crashes, Nvidia rises near buy points.
news.summary: On Tuesday, there was a decline in the major stock indexes due to a crash in ASML, impacting the chip sector. ASML experienced a continuous slide before the market opened. However, despite this, Nvidia and other key players in AI chips saw a slight increase after maintaining positions close to their buy points. Dow Jones futures showed a rise following these events. While ASML continued its sell-off trend, Nvidia's positive performance contributed to lifting the technology sector. This information was not cited from Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures rise after market dip; Apple stock up breaking buy point. Market recovery expected.
news.summary: Futures for the Dow Jones showed a slight increase on Wednesday following a market decline the previous day. Apple's stock is surging above a key buy point.

news.headline: New co-host marketplace by Airbnb aims to increase listing supply, expanding options for hosts.
New generative AI technology by Immerse Companion expands access to personalized learning and skill-building. Paris.
news.summary: In Paris, a new generative AI technology is set to revolutionize access to personalized learning, coaching, and expert-led skill-building in the workplace. This advancement is expected to have a widespread impact, making learning and skill development more accessible to a larger audience. The innovation promises to enhance the learning experience for many individuals, with potential increases in efficiency and effectiveness.

news.headline: XTM launches PayNow, a payout solution for US temporary workers. App offers Earned Wage Access.
news.summary: In Toronto, XTM Inc. (CSE:PAID / FSE:7XT), a Fintech company with offices in Miami, Toronto, Denver, and London, has introduced a Global Workers Payout Program named PayNow. This initiative provides temporary workers with access to tipping-payout and certified Earned Wage Access (EWA) through its QRails AnyDay™ product. By downloading a mobile app and completing a know your client process, temporary workers can benefit from this program.

news.headline: Novavax stocks drop by 16% after FDA halts trials for vaccine candidates.
Curtiss-Wright congratulates X-Energy on partnership with Amazon for Xe-100 SMR, targeting 5GW+ in new U.S. power projects by 2039.
news.summary: In Davidson, North Carolina, industrial company Curtiss-Wright commends X-Energy for partnering with Amazon on a significant project. By 2039, they aim to develop over 5 gigawatts of new power projects in the United States. This collaboration sets the target for the largest commercial deployment of Small Modular Reactors (SMRs) within the country.

news.headline: Bitcoin rises to $71K as Ethereum and Dogecoin remain flat amid stock reversal. Stellantis recalls 21K hybrid SUVs over brake issue. Tesla sends $760M to unknown wallets. Nvidia and AMD recover, while ASML struggles. Litecoin gains 7% after filing for spot ETF. Elon Musk to campaign for Trump in PA. US markets open mixed after chip sell-off. 5.6M vacant homes in the US, Trump's niece warns of his cognitive decline. IMF warns of increased market volatility in AI stock trading. Fed projects one rate cut by January. Asia and Europe markets in red, gold nears $2,700. Versus Systems stock surges 300%, Micron unveils DDR5 memory boost for AI PCs.
news.summary: The article covers various topics including the cryptocurrency market, US markets, politics, economy, world economy, and tech. Specifically, it mentions that the coin underpinning Dogecoin has become the market's biggest gainer, with Litecoin up 7% after filing for a spot ETF application. Bitcoin is approaching $68k, while Elon Musk's Tesla sent $760M to unknown wallets, potentially signaling a move away from Bitcoin. US stocks may open narrowly mixed after a chip sell-off, with Nvidia, AMD, ASML, and others dragging down the Nasdaq. Elon Musk is campaigning for Trump in Pennsylvania. On the economy, there are 5.6M vacant homes in the US, concerns about Trump's potential cognitive impairment, and warnings from the IMF regarding AI in stock trading. In the world economy, Asia and Europe markets are down, with gold nearing $2,700. In tech, Versus Systems stock has rocketed over 300%, Micron unveils DDR5 memory for AI PCs, and ASML faces struggles. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Abbott Laboratories beats Q3 earnings expectations with $10.64B revenue, 4.9% YoY growth, $1.21 EPS. Well-positioned to achieve upper end of annual forecast.
news.summary: Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) announced strong third-quarter results with sales totaling $10.64 billion, a 4.9% increase compared to the previous year, surpassing the expected $10.55 billion. The company's organic sales growth within its core business was 8.2%, driven by significant growth in Medical Devices. Abbott's adjusted diluted earnings per share stood at $1.21, exceeding analyst predictions of $1.20. The company has been praised for its performance, with an analyst highlighting its appealing valuation compared to other large-cap MedTech firms. Chairman Robert Ford credited the firm's diversified business model for the impressive quarterly results.

news.headline: VSee Health partners with Kwajalein Atoll Govt & US Coast Guard Cadets to launch sea ambulance telehealth for veterans. (Count: 98)
news.summary: VSee Health, Inc. (Nasdaq: VSEE) based in Boca Raton, Florida has partnered with the Kwajalein Atoll Local Government (KALGOV) and Kwajalein Atoll Sustainability Laboratory (KASL) to introduce an innovative telehealth program. This initiative is designed to enhance healthcare access for Marshallese veterans with service in the US military and residents of the region. By customizing workflow streams, VSee Health aims to optimize patient care and improve services. This collaborative effort has demonstrated significant success in its mission to provide better healthcare access to the target groups.

news.headline: Santander plans to reduce risk exposure by adopting a "capital-light" model. #finance #banking
New tool by Bloomberg helps investors evaluate exposure to nature and biodiversity risks. #Investing #RiskAssessment
news.summary: Bloomberg has introduced a new tool designed to aid investors in evaluating their susceptibility to risks associated with nature and biodiversity. This tool aims to provide investors with insights into their exposure levels related to natural resources, ecosystems, and biodiversity concerns. By utilizing this solution, investors will have a better understanding of the potential financial impacts these risks may pose to their portfolios. This initiative by Bloomberg is crucial as the global economy continues to grapple with environmental challenges. Investors can now utilize this tool to analyze and potentially mitigate the risks associated with nature and biodiversity, ensuring a more sustainable and environmentally conscious approach to investment decisions.

news.headline: Entrata introduces Procure to Pay and Homebody Rewards to enhance property management, boost efficiency, and resident engagement.
news.summary: In Salt Lake City, Entrata, a prominent multifamily Operating System (OS) powered by AI, unveiled two innovative products geared towards enhancing property management operations and enhancing resident satisfaction. The newly introduced Procure to Pay and Homebody Rewards aim to streamline procurement and payment procedures and incentivize resident involvement, respectively. The Procure to Pay tool simplifies purchasing and payment workflows, whereas Homebody Rewards incentivizes resident engagement through rewards that promote extended stay and operational efficiency. These additions are part of Entrata's efforts to optimize property management, with the goal of boosting efficiency and resident experience.

news.headline: House price growth is slowing, lowest in over a year. First American Data & Analytics reports in September 2024 HPI.
news.summary: First American Data & Analytics, a division of First American Financial Corporation, has recently published its September 2024 Home Price Index (HPI) report. This report, which provides property-centric information, risk management, and valuation solutions, offers insights into home price changes nationally, at the state level, and in metropolitan areas. The data is updated less than four weeks behind real-time and includes price tiers for different metropolitan areas. This report is a valuable resource for tracking the housing market, particularly for analysts, investors, and individuals interested in real estate trends.

news.headline: Arlo Technologies to discuss Q3 2024 results on Nov 7, 2024, at 5:00 p.m. ET. Conference call with investors and analysts.
news.summary: Arlo Technologies, Inc., a prominent smart home security firm traded on the NYSE under ARLO, disclosed plans to conduct a conference call for investors and analysts on November 7, 2024, at 5:00 p.m. ET (2:00 p.m. PT) to review its third quarter 2024 performance. The official report for the third quarter will be shared on the same day after the market closes. Interested individuals can participate in the live audio call by dialing the toll-free number that will be provided closer to the date of the call.

news.headline: Houston-The Woodlands-Sugar Land home prices rose by 1.6% YoY in September per First American Data & Analytics report.
news.summary: In Santa Ana, California, First American Data & Analytics, a division of First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), has unveiled its September 2024 Home Price Index (HPI) report. This report provides up-to-date information on property values, risk assessment, and valuation solutions. It tracks home price fluctuations at a national, state, and metropolitan level, including Core-Based Statistical Areas, with data available for different price tiers. This data is less than four weeks behind real-time market conditions.

news.headline: Atlanta-Sandy Springs-Alpharetta home prices hold steady in Sept 2024 year over year, per First American HPI report.
news.summary: In Santa Ana, California, First American Data & Analytics, a division of First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), has issued its September 2024 Home Price Index (HPI) report. This report provides property-centric data on home price changes nationally, statewide, and at the metropolitan level (Core-Based Statistical Area). It includes information on metropolitan price tiers and is updated less than four weeks behind real-time data.

news.headline: Los Angeles-Long Beach-Glendale home prices rose 2.0% year over year in Sep. First American Data & Analytics report.
news.summary: In Santa Ana, California, First American Data & Analytics, a division of First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), has unveiled its September 2024 Home Price Index (HPI) report. The report, a comprehensive analysis of property-centric data, risk management, and valuation solutions, provides insights into home price fluctuations on a national, state, and metropolitan level, including Core-Based Statistical Areas. This report offers timely information, tracking home price variations closely in near real time.

news.headline: Dallas-Plano-Irving home prices up 1.8% year over year in September, according to First American Data & Analytics.
news.summary: First American Data & Analytics, a division of First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), based in Santa Ana, California, has published its September 2024 Home Price Index (HPI) report. This report provides information on property values and risk assessment. The data is nearly real-time, covering national, state, and metropolitan (Core-Based Statistical Area) levels. It also includes price tiers for various metropolitan areas. This report is a significant tool for monitoring and analyzing home price changes.

news.headline: Beacon to release Q3 2024 earnings on Oct 30, 2024; earnings call on Oct 31, 2024 at 8:30am Eastern Time. #BECN #FinancialResults
news.summary: Beacon (Nasdaq: BECN) revealed that it will disclose its earnings report for the quarter concluding on September 30, 2024, subsequent to the market closure on Wednesday, October 30, 2024. A conference call and webcast discussing the financial outcomes will be conducted at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on October 31, 2024. Interested parties, analysts, and investors can register to participate in the earnings call and access the presentation slides on the Company’s website.

news.headline: Building Transparency and KieranTimberlake are collaborating on creating Tally 2.0, the next version of tallyLCA tool for analyzing environmental impact of materials.
news.summary: A nonprofit organization called Building Transparency in Seattle has revealed its plans to launch Tally® 2.0, the updated version of the tallyLCA tool, in partnership with KieranTimberlake. This new tool aims to offer open access data and resources for a more sustainable building future. It will focus on analyzing the environmental footprint of materials and various building designs, supporting the construction sector. Building Transparency's initiative to develop Tally 2.0 signifies a step forward in promoting eco-friendly practices in construction.

news.headline: U.S. mortgage demand plummets with a 17% decline as rates spike above 6.5%, the steepest drop in four years.
news.summary: The demand for mortgages in the U.S. experienced a significant decline, with a 17% drop in mortgage applications in the week ending Oct. 11. This marks the largest weekly decrease since April 2020 when the COVID-19 pandemic began. The Mortgage Bankers Association (MBA) reported this steep decline, attributing it to a sudden increase in interest rates that surprised homebuyers. Affordability concerns led many potential buyers to step back from the market. This decline follows a 5.1% drop in the previous week, making it the third consecutive week of decreasing mortgage applications. Mortgage rates have climbed to their highest levels since August, further impacting the housing market.
